author: Sneeuwpretje
title: Evermusic
content: Best Music Player I Have Used but need some bug fixes. A good job from the developer team.

author: Thunderbolt so to speak
title: Good
content:
Decent and easy manageable music player for dummies.
A variety of settings and options already featuring in the free download version. Not strictly needed to upgrade to premium version. A worthy alternative for most players. Content of this free of charge app.

author: Flamancho
title: Bug
content: After the update v5.5 app doesn’t work.

author: echtewitje
title: THANK YOU
content: Omg I’ve been searching for a music player where I can reduce the volume for so long!! I have this problem where my volume on even the lowest setting is way to loud! And with music players it’s even worse so I’m so happy this one has a option that can boost but also reduce the volume. Finally my ears don’t have die because the volume is way to loud!

author: mark-vp
title: Forgets position in playlist
content: This app is not usable for me because from time to time it forgets the position in my playlist, so I have to scroll to where I was. This is very annoying since I have a playlist with thousands of songs.

author: Jonathan Snoeck
title: JonathanSnoeckJackson ®
content: I love Magic,thanks dad Almighty God’s and Godinnen

author: SirMaxime
title: Freezes after editing song tags
content: After I edit a song tag the whole app freezes and I can’t select a new song until I close it a few times

author: 19EarlyGabber92
title: No background playing
content:
I just bought the pro version for 5.49€ and it isn’t even capable of playing music in background while connected to Bluetooth audio speaker.

What a pity

author: natachhha
title: Problème
content: J’ai acheter la version pro mais l’application n’arrête quand même pas de beuger récemment en plus quand je met tout à aleatoire je n’arrive même plus a trouver des chansons dans la barre de recherche de la playlist en plus de ça la «synchronisation» n’arrête pas de revenir en arrière au lieu d’aller au maximum il y a une heure on était sur 1557 chansons sur 2217 et maintenant je suis descendu à 1057 chansons
